a11y.emblem: DASTUR emblem — an arch framing a palm, dhow and wind tower

hero.title: Emirati Heritage, Reimagined for Today
hero.body: Discover authentic Emirati flavors presented through a refined contemporary experience — prepared with care and delivered beautifully to your door.

story.title: A Story Shaped by Land and Sea
story.p1: DASTUR is rooted in Emirati heritage and reimagined through a refined contemporary aesthetic. Our emblem gathers the symbols that shaped this coast — the palm, the dhow, and the wind tower — into a single arch.
story.p2: They speak of authenticity, craftsmanship, and the connection between land and sea: the desert that grows the date palm, the gulf that carried the trading dhow, and the towers that cooled the homes of a resourceful people.
story.p3: We carry that spirit into every order — traditional recipes plated with modern restraint and delivered with the hospitality of a home that keeps its word.

symbols.landDesc: Dates, grains and spices drawn from the desert table.
symbols.seaDesc: Coastal flavors carried by centuries of trade.
symbols.craftDesc: Recipes honored, then presented with quiet precision.

packaging.title: Crafted Beyond the Kitchen
packaging.body: Every DASTUR order is presented with the same attention to heritage, detail, and hospitality as the food inside — from the engraved skyline to the rope-bound handle.
points: Heritage skyline, engraved on every box
